Executive dashboard

FMD Packet Command Center

Auto-generated from live GitHub PR state. Separates route coverage from packet lane progress. Truth lane packets fix correctness; UI lane packets fix tokens and design-system compliance.
Last regenerated: 2026-03-22 19:56
In progress RP-09: Source Manager truth alignment
Why this matters Clicking 'Analyze' on a source shows 'undefined' everywhere because the frontend expects a rich analysis result the backend doesn't return. Also, 'Discover & Register' silently misses SqlServer-type connections due to a filter bug.
What comes next RP-10: The Gateway Connections section is completely broken — no backend endpoint exists. Connections KPI always shows 0. Wizard Step 1 can't list available databases.

hidden
 MIXED Audit Mostly still unaudited Expand later

What has to happen before 100% covered

  • Every route must be at least audited. Census currently shows 15 of 20 routes as NOT YET.
  • All remaining truth/workflow candidates must be repaired, merged, or consciously waived with docs updated.
  • All UI/token candidates must be resolved or explicitly accepted as design debt.
  • Hidden routes cannot stay a blind spot.
  • The census, truth audit, and decisions log must be refreshed after each major packet lane closes.
Current system state: 15% fully packetized route coverage. 11 truth packets merged, 4 remaining. 7 UI packets queued.
